Region.description: Seats.io API region identifier (e.g. NA, EU, SA, OC)

HoldExpirationInMinutes.description: Hold token expiration in minutes. When null, uses the default configured in the Seats.io dashboard.

PolicyName.description: CORS policy name registered in the pipeline.

AcceptedOrigins.description: Origins allowed to call the API (exact match). Leave empty to disable app-level CORS.

Cors.description: Cross-origin policy registered in the HTTP pipeline

ConnectionString.description: PostgreSQL connection string for Hangfire storage

SharedSecret.description: Shared key required in the X-XBOL-Diagnostics-Key header for internal background-job diagnostic probes

BackgroundJobDiagnostics.description: Protected diagnostic producer endpoints for Hangfire connectivity probes

APIPassword.description: API password provided by EVO Payments

MerchantId.description: Merchant identifier assigned by EVO Payments

Version.description: REST API version of the EVO Payments gateway

Value.description: Default exchange rate value used as a fallback for organizers without a configured exchange rate.

Url.description: Frontend URL where clients complete the payment

Primary.description: Primary brand color used for email CTAs and links

PrimaryDarken.description: Darker primary brand color used for hover states

PrimaryLighten.description: Lighter primary brand color used for subtle backgrounds

Secondary.description: Secondary brand color used for body copy

SecondaryDarken.description: Darker secondary brand color used for headings

SecondaryLighten.description: Lighter secondary brand color used for subtle borders and backgrounds

FontFamily.description: CSS font-family used by email templates

LogoPath.description: Relative path to the logo asset copied into the worker output

LogoUrl.description: Public logo URL for templates that use externally hosted images

HelpUrl.description: Public help URL or admin-portal-relative path linked from email footers

SupportUrl.description: Public support/contact URL or admin-portal-relative path for email templates

SupportEmail.description: Support email address shown in email footers

PublicTermsAndConditionsUrl.description: Public terms and conditions URL for email templates
